title: Egyptian Delicate Couscous Casserole
description: A delicious and flavorful casserole made with couscous, Egyptian spices, and delicate flavors.

ingredients.name: egyptian spices
ingredients.notes: mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Cook couscous according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add sliced eggplant and cook until tender, about 10 minutes.
Stir in Egyptian spices and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine cooked couscous, eggplant mixture, and chicken broth.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
